brief: Andy Burnham becomes UK PM amid warnings about national challenges; US and Iran exchange fire after troop deaths; a ferry sinks off Guyana; and research papers explore writing processes, AI coding agents, and human-robot juggling.
news_summary: Andy Burnham prepares to become UK prime minister, warning of honesty needed. US launches airstrikes after two troops killed, and Iran retaliates. A ferry sinks off Guyana with dozens missing. Thames Water creditors seek talks as nationalization looms. Second legionnaires' death in NYC.
papers_summary: Studies examine the build-measure-learn loop in startups, biographical factors in L2 writing instructors, children's multimodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on personal statements. Other papers analyze urban driving data, MLLMs for visualization, and AI coding agent vulnerabilities.

en.brief: Andy Burnham becomes UK PM amid warnings about national challenges; US and Iran exchange fire after troop deaths; a ferry sinks off Guyana; and research papers explore writing processes, AI coding agents, and human-robot juggling.
en.news_summary: Andy Burnham prepares to become UK prime minister, warning of honesty needed. US launches airstrikes after two troops killed, and Iran retaliates. A ferry sinks off Guyana with dozens missing. Thames Water creditors seek talks as nationalization looms. Second legionnaires' death in NYC.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine the build-measure-learn loop in startups, biographical factors in L2 writing instructors, children's multimodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on personal statements. Other papers analyze urban driving data, MLLMs for visualization, and AI coding agent vulnerabilities.

zh.brief: 今日新闻包括雙生姐妹身高不足1.2米为癌症提供关键线索、揭阳虐狗案引发全球抗议、K-pop突破朝鲜封锁、欧洲热浪促使中国空调热销、世界杯金靴之争白热化，以及首次发现宜居带类地行星存在大气层。研究方面，主要关注写作过程和多模态大语言模型的评估。
zh.news_summary: 中國雙生姐妹身高不足1.2米，卻為癌症預防提供關鍵線索；揭陽虐狗案引爆全球輿論；K-pop突破重重封鎖傳入朝鮮；歐洲熱浪下轉向中國空調；姆巴佩領跑世界盃金靴之爭，梅西仍有機會反超；首次在宜居帶發現類似地球的行星擁有大氣層。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無重點中文論文，英文論文主要探討寫作過程中的停頓分析、多模態大語言模型對科學可視化的理解，以及人類與機器人合作拋接物體的規劃。

todays_image.caption: Just as the Yoroi Ferry carried passengers across uncertain waters, Burnham urges the UK to navigate its own hidden currents with honesty before crossing into a new leadership.
todays_image.title: Yoroi Ferry, Koami-cho (Yoroi-no-watashi, Koami-cho) From the Series One Hundred Famous views of Edo
